description: Complete the microservices architecture diagram for the 'Sock Shop' reference architecture in diagrams.net (draw.io) using the initial file ~/Diagrams/sock_shop_architecture.drawio and the specifications in ~/Desktop/service_manifest.json. Add all missing components (7 services, 4 databases, 1 message queue) to the diagram using Rectangle shapes for Services, Cylinder shapes for Databases, and a distinctive shape for the Message Queue. Connect all components from dependent to dependency according to the manifest, labeling every connection edge with the correct protocol (HTTP, TCP, or AMQP). Color-code the shapes based on their technology stack using the hex codes provided in the manifest and include a legend explaining the color coding. Export the final organized diagram to ~/Diagrams/exports/sock_shop_architecture.svg and ~/Diagrams/exports/sock_shop_architecture.png.
